response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for a junior/entry-level Java role. Severe seniority mismatch creates high overqualification risk: likely compensation expectations, retention concerns, and poor fit for a role designed for early-career development. Java is only a peripheral skill (mostly DLang, TypeScript, Node.js), and German is listed as only Basic despite the role requiring strong German verbal and written skills for insurance clients in Germany.
strengths: Deep, broad technical background across many languages, architectures, and cloud/agile practices
Demonstrated agile/TDD/CI-CD experience directly relevant to the team's working style
Berlin-based with proven mentoring/teaching record (workshops, dojos, courses)
concerns: Massive overqualification — staff/senior engineer applying for entry-level position
German listed as only Basic; role requires strong written and verbal German
Java is a minor footnote in skills; primary stacks are TypeScript/Node and DLang

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and agile/TDD experience
